Course​

Course

Operations​

POST/course/coursesGET/course/courses-systemGET/course/courses-publishedGET/course/courses-by-instructor/{instructorId}GET/course/courses/{courseId}DELETE/course/courses/{courseId}GET/course/courses/{courseId}/detailPATCH/course/courses/{courseId}/basic-infoPOST/course/courses/{courseId}/enrollGET/course/courses/{courseId}/progressPOST/course/courses/{courseId}/finishPOST/course/courses/{courseId}/reviewsPOST/course/courses/{courseId}/bookmarkPOST/course/courses/{courseId}/unbookmarkPOST/course/courses/{courseId}/trigger-learning-reminderGET/course/courses/{courseId}/landingPOST/course/courses/{courseId}/approvePOST/course/courses/{courseId}/declinePOST/course/courses/{courseId}/hidePOST/course/courses/{courseId}/unhideGET/course/courses-my-enrolledGET/course/certificates-myGET/course/certificates/{certificateId}

Create course​

POST
/course/courses

Authorizations​

Oauth2

OAuth2 Security Scheme

authorizationCode Flow
Authorization URL"http://authentik.egolia.localhost/application/o/authorize"
Token URL"http://authentik.egolia.localhost/application/o/token"
Scopes:
  • "openid"Required for OIDC
  • "profile"Access to user profile

Request Body​

application/json
JSON
{
  
"id": "123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",
  
"title": "Introduction to Programming",
  
"slug": "introduction-to-programming",
  
"instructorId": "100",
  
"status": "draft",
  
"price": 1000000
}

Responses​

Course created

application/json
JSON
{
  
"data": {
  
  
"id": "123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",
  
  
"title": "Introduction to Programming",
  
  
"slug": "introduction-to-programming",
  
  
"instructorId": "100",
  
  
"status": "draft",
  
  
"price": 1000000
  
}
}
POST
/course/courses

Playground​

Authorization
Body

Samples​

Get system courses​

GET
/course/courses-system

Authorizations​

Oauth2

OAuth2 Security Scheme

authorizationCode Flow
Authorization URL"http://authentik.egolia.localhost/application/o/authorize"
Token URL"http://authentik.egolia.localhost/application/o/token"
Scopes:
  • "openid"Required for OIDC
  • "profile"Access to user profile

Parameters​

Query Parameters

status
Type
string
Valid values
"draft""approved""published""archived"
Example"draft"
Default
"draft"
page

Page number for pagination

Type
integer
Example1
Minimum
1
Default
1
limit

Number of items per page

Type
integer
Example20
Minimum
1
Maximum
100
Default
20
order

Sort order

Type
string
Valid values
"asc""desc"
Example"desc"
Default
"desc"

Responses​

Courses in system

application/json
JSON
{
  
"data": [
  
  
{
  
  
  
"id": "123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",
  
  
  
"title": "Introduction to Programming",
  
  
  
"slug": "introduction-to-programming",
  
  
  
"instructorId": "100",
  
  
  
"status": "draft",
  
  
  
"price": 1000000
  
  
}
  
],
  
"pagination": {
  
  
"page": 1,
  
  
"limit": 20,
  
  
"total": 100,
  
  
"totalPages": 5,
  
  
"hasNext": true,
  
  
"hasPrev": false
  
}
}
GET
/course/courses-system

string
Required

Format
"uuid"

status
page

Oauth2

OAuth2 Security Scheme

authorizationCode Flow
Authorization URL"http://authentik.egolia.localhost/application/o/authorize"

  • "openid"Required for OIDC
  • "profile"Access to user profile

Parameters​

Path Parameters

courseId*
Required

Responses​

Full course content with section and lesson references

application/json
JSON
{
  
"data": {
  
  
"course": {
  
  
  
"id": "123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",
  
  
  
"title": "Introduction to Programming",
  
  
  
"slug": "introduction-to-programming",
  
  
  
"instructorId": "100",
  
  
  
"status": "draft",
  
  
  
"price": 1000000
  
  
},
  
  
"sections": [
  
  
  
{
  
  
  
  
"section": {
  
  
  
  
  
"id": "0de4f8f2-3440-4e29-9b88-9cfbbf4476fc",
  
  
  
  
  
"courseId": "123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",
  
  
  
  
  
"title": "OOP Fundamentals"
  
  
  
  
},
  
  
  
  
"lessonIds": [
  
  
  
  
  
"string"
  
  
  
  
]
  
  
  
}
  
  
]
  
}
}
GET
/course/courses/{courseId}/detail

Variables
Key

"videoUrl": "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ",
  
  
"duration": 300
  
},
  
"test": {
  
  
"id": "2926aa3f-29ad-449b-9556-c44d4fc676a0",
  
  
"courseId": "123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",
  
  
"title": "Introduction to Python",

"questions": [
  
  
  
{

]
  
  
  
}
  
  
]
  
}
}

Receipt​

Operations​

GET/billing/transactions/{transactionId}/receipt

Get transaction receipt detail​

GET
/billing/transactions/{transactionId}/receipt

Authorizations​

Oauth2

OAuth2 Security Scheme

authorizationCode Flow
Authorization URL"http://authentik.egolia.localhost/application/o/authorize"
Token URL"http://authentik.egolia.localhost/application/o/token"
Scopes:
  • "openid"Required for OIDC
  • "profile"Access to user profile

Parameters​

Path Parameters

transactionId*

Unique identifier of the billing transaction

Type
string
Required
Example"4c7c8f0a-4f6e-4da1-867d-38f1120f0e5d"
Format
"uuid"

Responses​

Billing receipt detail

application/json
JSON
{
  
"transaction": {
  
  
"id": "4c7c8f0a-4f6e-4da1-867d-38f1120f0e5d",
  
  
"userId": "100",
  
  
"courseId": "0f4f19b1-1602-4c12-ac1a-9ad5baf1e4dc",
  
  
"amount": 499000,
  
  
"currency": "VND",
  
  
"status": "completed",
  
  
"createdAt": "2026-03-25T08:30:00Z"
  
},
  
"receiptNumber": "RCPT-20260325-0001",
  
"issuedAt": "2026-03-25T08:35:00Z",
  
"billedTo": {
  
  
"userId": "100",
  
  
"email": "learner@egolia.dev"
  
}
}

/billing/transactions/{transactionId}/receipt

Admin Billing​

Billing administration and analytics

Operations​

GET/billing/admin/analytics/revenueGET/billing/admin/transactions

Get platform revenue analytics​

GET
/billing/admin/analytics/revenue

Authorizations​

Oauth2

OAuth2 Security Scheme

authorizationCode Flow
Authorization URL"http://authentik.egolia.localhost/application/o/authorize"
Token URL"http://authentik.egolia.localhost/application/o/token"
Scopes:
  • "openid"Required for OIDC
  • "profile"Access to user profile

Parameters​

Query Parameters

from*
Type
string
Required
Example"2026-03-01"
Format
"date"
to*
Type
string
Required
Example"2026-03-31"
Format
"date"

Responses​

Revenue analytics

application/json
JSON
{
  
"from": "2026-03-01",
  
"to": "2026-03-31",
  
"currency": "VND",
  
"totalRevenue": 152000000,
  
"completedTransactions": 421,
  
"failedTransactions": 9
}
GET
/billing/admin/analytics/revenue

Variables
Key

Oauth2

OAuth2 Security Scheme

authorizationCode Flow
Authorization URL"http://authentik.egolia.localhost/application/o/authorize"
Token URL"http://authentik.egolia.localhost/application/o/token"

Parameters​

Query Parameters

page

Page number for pagination

Type
integer
Example1
Minimum
1
Default
1
limit

Number of items per page

Type
integer
Example20
Minimum
1
Maximum
100
Default
20
order

Sort order

Type
string
Valid values
"asc""desc"
Example"desc"
Default
"desc"
status

Filter by transaction status

Type
string
Valid values
"pending""completed""failed"
Example"completed"

Responses​

Platform transaction history

JSON

Post​

/blog/posts

Oauth2

OAuth2 Security Scheme

authorizationCode Flow
Authorization URL"http://authentik.egolia.localhost/application/o/authorize"
Token URL"http://authentik.egolia.localhost/application/o/token"
Scopes:
  • "openid"Required for OIDC
  • "profile"Access to user profile

Parameters​

Query Parameters

q

Full-text keyword for post search

Type
string
Example"hoc tap hieu qua"
tag

Filter posts by tag

Type
string
Example"learning"
page

Page number for pagination

Type
integer
Example1
Minimum
1
Default
1
limit

Number of items per page

Type
integer
Example20
Minimum
1
Maximum
100
Default
20
order

Sort order

Type
string
Valid values
"asc""desc"
Example"desc"
Default
"desc"

]
